summary: Custom route builder screen designed in rideglory.pen — 4 frames (empty, 3 waypoints, 9/9 limit, active search). Design system tokens extracted from rideglory.pen and applied exactly.

frames.name: Custom Route Builder — Vacío
frames.description: No waypoints, map with tap hint overlay, disabled Add/Continue CTAs

frames.name: Custom Route Builder — Con Waypoints
frames.description: 3 numbered pins on map with route polyline, waypoint cards list, active orange Continuar CTA

frames.name: Custom Route Builder — Límite 9/9
frames.description: 9 pins on map, orange warning banner, disabled Add button with max hint, active Continuar

frames.name: Custom Route Builder — Búsqueda Activa
frames.description: Active search with autocomplete dropdown visible, map dimmed, keyboard placeholder at bottom

qualityGates.name: used_existing_pen_file
qualityGates.detail: Edited rideglory.pen directly. Did NOT create a new .pen file.

qualityGates.name: design_matches_existing_system
qualityGates.detail: All colors, typography, spacing, and border radius values extracted from rideglory.pen variables and matched to existing screen patterns (Crear Evento, Events List, Registration Form).

qualityGates.name: four_required_frames_created
qualityGates.detail: Empty state, populated (3 waypoints), at limit (9/9), and active search — all four frames created and verified via screenshot.
